suppress.notes: FALSE POSITIVE: dependency-check matches the LINE Messaging API SDK's Jackson companion module against CVEs filed against the WhatsApp mobile client (also named "line"). The vulnerable CPE is for an unrelated product family. Confirmed against security-report-2026-06-15.md.

FALSE POSITIVE: Apache Camel's Telegram component (camel-telegram) is consistently misidentified as the Telegram Messenger client. The NVD CPE record for "telegram_messenger" matches every artifact whose name starts with "telegram"; CVE records like CVE-2024-* on the Messenger app are not reachable via a Camel webhook receiver. Confirmed against security-report-2026-06-15.md.

FALSE POSITIVE: Apache Camel's WhatsApp component (camel-whatsapp) is misidentified as the WhatsApp mobile client. Same pattern as camel-telegram above: NVD CPE for the consumer app matches the adapter library. WhatsApp client CVEs are not reachable through a Camel routing component. Confirmed against security-report-2026-06-15.md.
